title: Cloud Baby Shower Balloons 6-Piece Foil Party Decoration Set
features: 【Product Content】You Will Receive 6 Pieces Of Cloud Balloons. The Sizes Are 74X60Cm And 72X56Cm Respectively, And The Colors Include White, Pink And Blue. They Are Suitable For Decoration For Baby Showers, Baby Birthdays And Various Celebrations.

【Product Material】This Balloon Is Made Of Aluminum Film, Which Has Good Durability And Luster. The Aluminum Film Material Not Only Allows The Balloon To Maintain Its Shape And Color For A Long Time After Being Inflated, But Also Prevents The Balloon From Bursting Due To External Pressure, Making It Ideal For Multiple Uses.

【Creative Design】This Cloud Balloon Has A Cute Design And Vivid Expression, Suitable For Baby Showers, Baby Birthdays And Other Occasions. Its Unique Design Attracts The Attention Of Children And Guests And Adds To The Joyful Atmosphere Of The Celebration.

【Wide Application】This Product Is Suitable For Various Baby And Children'S Celebrations, Including Baby Showers, Birthday Parties, Full Moon Drinks, Etc. Whether Used As Decoration Or As A Photo Backdrop, This Cloud Balloon Will Add A Splash Of Color And Fun To Your Event.

【Easy To Use】This Balloon Is Simple To Operate, Just Fill It With Helium Or Air And It'S Ready To Use. The Convenient And Fast Design Makes It Easy To Install And Place In Various Activities, Allowing You To Quickly Complete The Arrangement And Enjoy The Fun Of Celebrating.
